title: cheiranthus orientalis
intro: Cheiranthus orientalis, also known as the Chinese forget-me-not or oriental forget-me-not, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. Cheiranthus orientalis has been used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, and has been shown to have antioxidant and immune-boosting properties, offering benefits for cardiovascular health and reducing the risk of certain diseases. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
